ai_role: Ethernet AI data-center networking systems and software
tvs_tiebreaker: Needs strong TVS and favorable entry because chokepoint durability is high but not monopolistic.
technical_timing_rule: Technicals can gate adds; avoid chasing EXTENDED moves.
rationale: Arista is a strong beneficiary of Ethernet-based AI cluster networking, but the category remains competitive and hyperscaler spending can be lumpy.
